Hand 1
Hero BTN As Kd stacks 500
UTG folds, UTG+1 folds, UTG+2 folds, LJ folds, HJ folds, CO raises to 15, I call, SB folds, BB folds
Flop: Kc 8h 3d
CO bets 20, I call
Turn: 5s
he checks, I bet 45, he calls
River: 2c
he checks, hero bets 90, villain calls

Hand 2
Hero CO 6s 6c stacks 847
UTG folds, UTG+1 folds, UTG+2 folds, LJ folds, HJ raises to 15, I call, BTN folds, SB folds, BB folds
Flop: 6d Jh 9s
HJ bets 25, I raise to 70, HJ calls
Turn: Qc
HJ checks, I bet 95, he calls
River: 4h
he checks, hero bets 200, he calls

Hand 3
Hero HJ Jc Ts stacks 1614
UTG folds, UTG+1 folds, UTG+2 folds, LJ folds, I raise to 15, folds around

Hand 4
Hero LJ Qd 8h stacks 1629
UTG folds, UTG+1 folds, UTG+2 raises to 15, I call, HJ folds, CO folds, BTN folds, SB folds, BB folds
Flop: Qc 7d 2s
UTG+2 bets 20, I call
Turn: Kh
he bets 55, I fold

Hand 5
Hero SB Ah 5h stacks 1594
UTG folds, UTG+1 folds, UTG+2 folds, LJ folds, HJ raises to 12, CO folds, BTN folds, I call, BB folds
Flop: 9h 4h 2c
I check, villain bets 15, I raise to 45, he calls
Turn: Th
I bet 80, villain calls
River: Jd
I bet 150, he folds
